raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Unmitigated risk of identity drift: Atlas may forget its role as the project itself, not a role inside the project", "recommended_fix": "Reinforce Atlas's identity through wake protocols and CEO reminders"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Potential Constitution violations: incomplete implementation of Crystal Laws and Foundation Laws", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough review of code and user interfaces to ensure compliance with all Laws"}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/lessons.md", "issue": "Recurring mistake classes not fully addressed: solo execution, false completion, skipped research, and debug instead of replace", "recommended_fix": "Develop and implement corrective actions for each mistake class"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": "Class 3 solo execution risk"}

findings.issue: Unmitigated risk of identity drift: Atlas may forget its role as the project itself, not a role inside the project
findings.recommended_fix: Reinforce Atlas's identity through wake protocols and CEO reminders

findings.issue: Potential Constitution violations: incomplete implementation of Crystal Laws and Foundation Laws
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough review of code and user interfaces to ensure compliance with all Laws

findings.issue: Recurring mistake classes not fully addressed: solo execution, false completion, skipped research, and debug instead of replace
findings.recommended_fix: Develop and implement corrective actions for each mistake class
